Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur et al., Mainz et al., 1950. {{Navigation bar Egyptian Calendar|qq=}} ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar|qq=}} {{translated page|de|Chenep-scha|version=217297418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Day of the Sand Holes]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[sn:Day of the Sand Holes]] [[sn: failed]] }} [[sn: failed]] [[sn:Chenep-scha]] [[de:Chenep-scha]] [[sn:henep-scha]] [[ja:砂を取る祭]] [[sn:Day of the Sand Holes]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:Ancient_Egyptian_festivals]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

{{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |EXPANDED-NAME = {{ill|Old Kingdom of Egypt|de|Altes Reich (Ägypten)|ja|古王国|zh|古埃及王国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Kingdom of Egypt|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|1=Old Kingdom of Egypt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q177819}} |NAME = W3-Aa1:N35-Q3:D40-N37:D36-N33:Z2
Heb-chenep-scha
''Ḥb-ḫnp-šˁ''
''Festival of Shifting Sand / Collecting Sand''
''Festival of Pouring Sand'' |EXPANDED-NAME2 = '''Festival date''' |NAME2 = N12:Z1*Z1:N5-N11:Z1*Z1 SA:x*t |NAME2-TRANSCRIPTION =''3ḫt'' |NAME2-EXPLANATION = ''Second lunar day of the second month of the Achet period'' |IMAGE1 = Pyramid at Lahun.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 300px |IMAGE1-DESCRIPTION = Pyramid of Senusret II at Al-Lahun }} The festival '''Chenep-scha''' (also '''Day of Collecting Sand''') is documented from the {{ill|Old Kingdom of Egypt|de|Altes Reich (Ägypten)|ja|古王国|zh|古埃及王国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Kingdom of Egypt|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|1=Old Kingdom of Egypt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q177819}} under the reign of King ([[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]) [[:en:Nyuserre Ini|Nyuserre Ini]]. It is associated with the birth of [[:en:Horus|Horus]] and the goddess [[:en:Wosret|Wosret]], attested in [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]] at [[:en:Thebes, Egypt|Thebes, Egypt]], who was revered as a protector of the youthful Horus. == Background == === Old Kingdom === The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the commonly observed first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but involved the [[:en:Ritual|ritual]] of ''filling the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second lunar day. The {{ill|Menchet-Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェト祭|zh|孟切特节|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet-Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day, symbolizing the ''clothing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. === 12th Dynasty === In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]], the festival was also named ''Day of Collecting Sand of Anubis on his mountain in the Pyramid City of Senusret II, the Blessed''. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Pyramid of Senusret II]] at [[:en:El Lahun|El Lahun]] was traditionally assigned to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary temple of Senusret II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|センウセレト2世葬祭殿|zh|辛努塞尔特二世的太庙|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary temple of Senusret II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリン・パピルス10248|zh|柏林纸草文献10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), the announcement is noted in the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプトの太陰暦|zh|古埃及阴历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for the 14th regnal year of Senusret III on the [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] 18, second lunar day. Since the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|曲芸団の祭典暦|zh|杂技团节日历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhat III]] scheduled the Menchet festival for the second month of Achet without specifying the date, a lunar date announcement had not been available at the time of creating the festival calendar. ==Overview 2== {{Improve||This article|reason=The dating must be corrected. (See discussion here and at {{ill|Discussion: Menchet-Fest|de|Diskussion: Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェット祭の議論|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Discussion: Menchet-Fest|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) The article does not yet contain any individual citation.|qq=}} {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |EXTENDED NAME = [[:en:Old Kingdom of Egypt|Old Kingdom (Egypt)]] |NAME = W3-Aa1:N35-Q3:D40-N37:D36-N33:Z2
Heb-chenep-scha
''Ḥb-ḫnp-šˁ''
''Festival of Sand Shifting / Sand Lifting''
''Festival of Sand Dispersion'' |EXTENDED NAME2 = '''Festival Date''' |NAME2 = N12:Z1*Z1:N5-N11:Z1*Z1 SA:x*t |NAME2-TRANSCRIPTION = ''3ḫt'' |NAME2-EXPLANATION = ''Second day of the moon in the second month of the Achet period'' |IMAGE1 = Pyramid at Lahun.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 300px |IMAGE1-DESCRIPTION = Sesostris II Pyramid in Al-Lahun }} The festival '''Chenep-scha''' (also known as '''Day of Sand Lifting''') has been attested since the [[:en:Old Kingdom of Egypt|Old Kingdom (Egypt)]] under the reign of King ([[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]) [[:en:Nyuserre Ini|Niuserre]]. It is associated with the birth of [[:en:Horus|Horus]] and the goddess [[:en:Wosret|Wosret]], attested in the [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom]] at [[:en:Thebes, Egypt|Thebes (Egypt)]], who was venerated as the protector of the youthful Horus. ==Background== ===Old Kingdom=== The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the otherwise customary first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but instead included the [[:en:Ritual|Ritual]] of the ''Filling of the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second day of the lunar month. The {{ill|Menchet Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェット祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day and symbolized the ''Dressing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. ===12th Dynasty=== In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|12th Dynasty]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Sesostris III]], the designation ''Day of the Sand Lifting of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]] on his mountain in the pyramid city of Sesostris II, the Blessed'' was also used. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Sesostris II Pyramid]] of [[:en:El Lahun|Al-Lahun]] was traditionally assigned, by virtue of its location, to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|セソストリスIIの葬祭寺|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリンパピルス10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) it is recorded in the 14th regnal year of Sesostris III that the announcement in the {{ill|Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|ja|古代エジプトの月暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] on the second lunar day was made. Since in the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|アクロバット団の祭日暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhet III]] the Menchet Festival for the second month Achet was scheduled without a specified date, an announcement of the lunar date was not yet available at the time of the creation of that festival calendar. ==Literature== * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Hand Dictionary of Egyptian – German. (2800 – 950 BC). The Language of the Pharaohs'' (= ''Hannig-Lexica.'' Volume 1 = {{ill|Cultural History of the Ancient World|de|Kulturgeschichte der Antiken Welt|ja|古代世界の文化史|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural History of the Ancient World|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Volume 64). Marburg Edition, 4th revised edition, by Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9. p. 649. * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|ja|ロルフ・クラウス|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Sothis and Lunar Dates. Studies on the Astronomical and Technical Chronology of Ancient Egypt'' (= ''Hildesheim Egyptological Contributions (HÄB)''. Volume 20). Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Incorrect ISBN|3-8067-8086-X|qq=}}. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|ja|ジークフリート・ショット|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491464}}: ''Ancient Egyptian Festival Dates'' (= ''Academy of Sciences and Literature. Memoirs of the Humanities and Social Sciences Class (AM-GS)''. 1950, Volume 10, {{ISSN|0002-2977|qq=}}). Publisher of the Academy of Sciences and Literature, Mainz et al. 1950. {{Navigation bar Egyptian Calendar|qq=}} == Literature == * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Großes Handwörterbuch Ägyptisch – Deutsch. (2800 – 950 v. Chr.). Die Sprache der Pharaonen'' (= ''Hannig-Lexica.'' Volume 1 = ''{{ill|Cultural History of the Ancient World|de|Kulturgeschichte der Antiken Welt|ja|古代世界の文化史|zh|古代世界文化史|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural History of the Ancient World|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 64). Marburger Edition, 4th revised edition, von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9. p. 649. * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|ja|ロルフ・クラウス|zh|罗尔夫·克劳斯|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten. Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens'' (= ''Hildesheimer ägyptologische Beiträge. (HÄB).'' Volume 20). Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Incorrect ISBN|3-8067-8086-X|qq=}}. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|ja|ジークフリート・ショット|zh|西格弗里德·肖特|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491464}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten'' (= ''Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur. The {{ill|Menchet Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェット祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day and symbolized the ''Dressing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. ===12th Dynasty=== In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|12th Dynasty]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Sesostris III]], the designation ''Day of the Sand Lifting of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]] on his mountain in the pyramid city of Sesostris II, the Blessed'' was also used. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Sesostris II Pyramid]] of [[:en:El Lahun|Al-Lahun]] was traditionally assigned, by virtue of its location, to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|セソストリスIIの葬祭寺|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリンパピルス10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) it is recorded in the 14th regnal year of Sesostris III that the announcement in the {{ill|Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|ja|古代エジプトの月暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] on the second lunar day was made. Since in the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|アクロバット団の祭日暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhet III]] the Menchet Festival for the second month Achet was scheduled without a specified date, an announcement of the lunar date was not yet available at the time of the creation of that festival calendar. ==Literature== * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Hand Dictionary of Egyptian – German. {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |EXPANDED-NAME = {{ill|Old Kingdom of Egypt|de|Altes Reich (Ägypten)|ja|古王国|zh|古埃及王国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Kingdom of Egypt|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|1=Old Kingdom of Egypt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q177819}} |NAME = W3-Aa1:N35-Q3:D40-N37:D36-N33:Z2
Heb-chenep-scha
''Ḥb-ḫnp-šˁ''
''Festival of Shifting Sand / Collecting Sand''
''Festival of Pouring Sand'' |EXPANDED-NAME2 = '''Festival date''' |NAME2 = N12:Z1*Z1:N5-N11:Z1*Z1 SA:x*t |NAME2-TRANSCRIPTION =''3ḫt'' |NAME2-EXPLANATION = ''Second lunar day of the second month of the Achet period'' |IMAGE1 = Pyramid at Lahun.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 300px |IMAGE1-DESCRIPTION = Pyramid of Senusret II at Al-Lahun }} Sand-gathering Day ('''Chenep-scha)''' is a festival from the {{ill|Old Kingdom of Egypt|de|Altes Reich (Ägypten)|ja|古王国|zh|古埃及王国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Kingdom of Egypt|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|1=Old Kingdom of Egypt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q177819}} under the reign of King ([[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]) [[:en:Nyuserre Ini|Nyuserre Ini]]. It is associated with the birth of [[:en:Horus|Horus]] and the goddess [[:en:Wosret|Wosret]], attested in [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]] at [[:en:Thebes, Egypt|Thebes, Egypt]], who was revered as a protector of the youthful Horus. == Background == === Old Kingdom === The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the commonly observed first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but involved the [[:en:Ritual|ritual]] of ''filling the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second lunar day. The {{ill|Menchet-Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェト祭|zh|孟切特节|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet-Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day, symbolizing the ''clothing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. === 12th Dynasty === In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]], the festival was also named ''Day of Collecting Sand of Anubis on his mountain in the Pyramid City of Senusret II, the Blessed''. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Pyramid of Senusret II]] at [[:en:El Lahun|El Lahun]] was traditionally assigned to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary temple of Senusret II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|センウセレト2世葬祭殿|zh|辛努塞尔特二世的太庙|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary temple of Senusret II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリン・パピルス10248|zh|柏林纸草文献10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), the announcement is noted in the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプトの太陰暦|zh|古埃及阴历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for the 14th regnal year of Senusret III on the [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] 18, second lunar day. Since the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|曲芸団の祭典暦|zh|杂技团节日历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhat III]] scheduled the Menchet festival for the second month of Achet without specifying the date, a lunar date announcement had not been available at the time of creating the festival calendar. ==Overview 2== {{Improve||This article|reason=The dating must be corrected. (See discussion here and at {{ill|Discussion: Menchet-Fest|de|Diskussion: Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェット祭の議論|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Discussion: Menchet-Fest|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) The article does not yet contain any individual citation.|qq=}} {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |EXTENDED NAME = [[:en:Old Kingdom of Egypt|Old Kingdom (Egypt)]] |NAME = W3-Aa1:N35-Q3:D40-N37:D36-N33:Z2
Heb-chenep-scha
''Ḥb-ḫnp-šˁ''
''Festival of Sand Shifting / Sand Lifting''
''Festival of Sand Dispersion'' |EXTENDED NAME2 = '''Festival Date''' |NAME2 = N12:Z1*Z1:N5-N11:Z1*Z1 SA:x*t |NAME2-TRANSCRIPTION = ''3ḫt'' |NAME2-EXPLANATION = ''Second day of the moon in the second month of the Achet period'' |IMAGE1 = Pyramid at Lahun.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 300px |IMAGE1-DESCRIPTION = Sesostris II Pyramid in Al-Lahun }} The festival '''Chenep-scha''' (also known as '''Day of Sand Lifting''') has been attested since the [[:en:Old Kingdom of Egypt|Old Kingdom (Egypt)]] under the reign of King ([[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]) [[:en:Nyuserre Ini|Niuserre]]. It is associated with the birth of [[:en:Horus|Horus]] and the goddess [[:en:Wosret|Wosret]], attested in the [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom]] at [[:en:Thebes, Egypt|Thebes (Egypt)]], who was venerated as the protector of the youthful Horus. ==Background== ===Old Kingdom=== The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the otherwise customary first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but instead included the [[:en:Ritual|Ritual]] of the ''Filling of the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second day of the lunar month. The {{ill|Menchet Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェット祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day and symbolized the ''Dressing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. ===12th Dynasty=== In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|12th Dynasty]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Sesostris III]], the designation ''Day of the Sand Lifting of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]] on his mountain in the pyramid city of Sesostris II, the Blessed'' was also used. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Sesostris II Pyramid]] of [[:en:El Lahun|Al-Lahun]] was traditionally assigned, by virtue of its location, to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|セソストリスIIの葬祭寺|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリンパピルス10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) it is recorded in the 14th regnal year of Sesostris III that the announcement in the {{ill|Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|ja|古代エジプトの月暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] on the second lunar day was made. Since in the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|アクロバット団の祭日暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhet III]] the Menchet Festival for the second month Achet was scheduled without a specified date, an announcement of the lunar date was not yet available at the time of the creation of that festival calendar. ==Literature== * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Great Hand Dictionary of Egyptian – German. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary temple of Senusret II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|センウセレト2世葬祭殿|zh|辛努塞尔特二世的太庙|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary temple of Senusret II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリン・パピルス10248|zh|柏林纸草文献10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), the announcement is noted in the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプトの太陰暦|zh|古埃及阴历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for the 14th regnal year of Senusret III on the [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] 18, second lunar day. Since the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|曲芸団の祭典暦|zh|杂技团节日历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhat III]] scheduled the Menchet festival for the second month of Achet without specifying the date, a lunar date announcement had not been available at the time of creating the festival calendar. ==Background== ===Old Kingdom=== The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the otherwise customary first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but instead included the [[:en:Ritual|Ritual]] of the ''Filling of the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second day of the lunar month. The {{ill|Menchet Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェット祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day and symbolized the ''Dressing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. ===12th Dynasty=== In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|12th Dynasty]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Sesostris III]], the designation ''Day of the Sand Lifting of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]] on his mountain in the pyramid city of Sesostris II, the Blessed'' was also used. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Sesostris II Pyramid]] of [[:en:El Lahun|Al-Lahun]] was traditionally assigned, by virtue of its location, to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|セソストリスIIの葬祭寺|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリンパピルス10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) it is recorded in the 14th regnal year of Sesostris III that the announcement in the {{ill|Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|ja|古代エジプトの月暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] on the second lunar day was made. Since in the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|アクロバット団の祭日暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhet III]] the Menchet Festival for the second month Achet was scheduled without a specified date, an announcement of the lunar date was not yet available at the time of the creation of that festival calendar. == Literature == * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Großes Handwörterbuch Ägyptisch – Deutsch. (2800 – 950 v. Chr.). Die Sprache der Pharaonen'' (= ''Hannig-Lexica.'' Volume 1 = ''{{ill|Cultural History of the Ancient World|de|Kulturgeschichte der Antiken Welt|ja|古代世界の文化史|zh|古代世界文化史|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural History of the Ancient World|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 64). Marburger Edition, 4th revised edition, von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9. p. 649. * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|ja|ロルフ・クラウス|zh|罗尔夫·克劳斯|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten. Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens'' (= ''Hildesheimer ägyptologische Beiträge. (HÄB).'' Volume 20). Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Incorrect ISBN|3-8067-8086-X|qq=}}. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|ja|ジークフリート・ショット|zh|西格弗里德·肖特|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491464}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten'' (= ''Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur. Abhandlungen der Geistes- und Sozialwissenschaftlichen Klasse. (AM-GS).'' 1950, Volume 10, {{ISSN|0002-2977|qq=}}). Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur et al., Mainz et al., 1950. ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar|qq=}} {{translated page|de|Chenep-scha|version=217297418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Day of the Sand Holes]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[sn:Day of the Sand Holes]] [[sn: failed]] }} [[sn: failed]] [[sn:Chenep-scha]] [[de:Chenep-scha]] [[sn:henep-scha]] [[ja:砂を取る祭]] [[sn:Day of the Sand Holes]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:Ancient_Egyptian_festivals]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] {{wikidata link|Q1069855}}

''Festival of Shifting Sand / Collecting Sand''
''Festival of Pouring Sand'' |EXPANDED-NAME2 = '''Festival date''' |NAME2 = N12:Z1*Z1:N5-N11:Z1*Z1 SA:x*t |NAME2-TRANSCRIPTION =''3ḫt'' |NAME2-EXPLANATION = ''Second lunar day of the second month of the Achet period'' |IMAGE1 = Pyramid at Lahun.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 300px |IMAGE1-DESCRIPTION = Pyramid of Senusret II at Al-Lahun }} Sand-gathering Day ('''Chenep-scha)''' is a festival from the {{ill|Old Kingdom of Egypt|de|Altes Reich (Ägypten)|ja|古王国|zh|古埃及王国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Kingdom of Egypt|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|1=Old Kingdom of Egypt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q177819}} under the reign of King ([[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]) [[:en:Nyuserre Ini|Nyuserre Ini]]. It is associated with the birth of [[:en:Horus|Horus]] and the goddess [[:en:Wosret|Wosret]], attested in [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]] at [[:en:Thebes, Egypt|Thebes, Egypt]], who was revered as a protector of the youthful Horus. == Background == === Old Kingdom === The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the commonly observed first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but involved the [[:en:Ritual|ritual]] of ''filling the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second lunar day. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Pyramid of Senusret II]] at [[:en:El Lahun|El Lahun]] was traditionally assigned to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. Since the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|曲芸団の祭典暦|zh|杂技团节日历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhat III]] scheduled the Menchet festival for the second month of Achet without specifying the date, a lunar date announcement had not been available at the time of creating the festival calendar. ==Background== ===Old Kingdom=== The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the otherwise customary first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but instead included the [[:en:Ritual|Ritual]] of the ''Filling of the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second day of the lunar month. The {{ill|Menchet Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェット祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day and symbolized the ''Dressing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. ===12th Dynasty=== In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|12th Dynasty]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Sesostris III]], the designation ''Day of the Sand Lifting of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]] on his mountain in the pyramid city of Sesostris II, the Blessed'' was also used. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Sesostris II Pyramid]] of [[:en:El Lahun|Al-Lahun]] was traditionally assigned, by virtue of its location, to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|セソストリスIIの葬祭寺|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリンパピルス10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) it is recorded in the 14th regnal year of Sesostris III that the announcement in the {{ill|Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|ja|古代エジプトの月暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] on the second lunar day was made. Since in the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|アクロバット団の祭日暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhet III]] the Menchet Festival for the second month Achet was scheduled without a specified date, an announcement of the lunar date was not yet available at the time of the creation of that festival calendar. == Literature == * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Großes Handwörterbuch Ägyptisch – Deutsch. (2800 – 950 v. Chr.). Die Sprache der Pharaonen'' (= ''Hannig-Lexica.'' Volume 1 = ''{{ill|Cultural History of the Ancient World|de|Kulturgeschichte der Antiken Welt|ja|古代世界の文化史|zh|古代世界文化史|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural History of the Ancient World|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 64). Marburger Edition, 4th revised edition, von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9. p. 649. * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|ja|ロルフ・クラウス|zh|罗尔夫·克劳斯|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten. Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens'' (= ''Hildesheimer ägyptologische Beiträge. (HÄB).'' Volume 20). Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Incorrect ISBN|3-8067-8086-X|qq=}}. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|ja|ジークフリート・ショット|zh|西格弗里德·肖特|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491464}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten'' (= ''Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur. Abhandlungen der Geistes- und Sozialwissenschaftlichen Klasse. (AM-GS).'' 1950, Volume 10, {{ISSN|0002-2977|qq=}}). Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur et al., Mainz et al., 1950. ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar|qq=}} {{translated page|de|Chenep-scha|version=217297418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[de:Chenep-scha]] [[ja:砂を取る祭]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:Ancient_Egyptian_festivals]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] {{wikidata link|Q1069855}}

{{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |EXPANDED-NAME = {{ill|Old Kingdom of Egypt|de|Altes Reich (Ägypten)|ja|古王国|zh|古埃及王国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Kingdom of Egypt|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|1=Old Kingdom of Egypt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q177819}} |NAME = W3-Aa1:N35-Q3:D40-N37:D36-N33:Z2
Heb-chenep-scha
''Ḥb-ḫnp-šˁ''
''Festival of Shifting Sand / Collecting Sand''
''Festival of Pouring Sand'' |EXPANDED-NAME2 = '''Festival date''' |NAME2 = N12:Z1*Z1:N5-N11:Z1*Z1 SA:x*t |NAME2-TRANSCRIPTION =''3ḫt'' |NAME2-EXPLANATION = ''Second lunar day of the second month of the Achet period'' |IMAGE1 = Pyramid at Lahun.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 300px |IMAGE1-DESCRIPTION = Pyramid of Senusret II at Al-Lahun }} Sand-gathering Day ('''Chenep-scha)''' is a festival from the {{ill|Old Kingdom of Egypt|de|Altes Reich (Ägypten)|ja|古王国|zh|古埃及王国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Kingdom of Egypt|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|1=Old Kingdom of Egypt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q177819}} under the reign of King ([[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]) [[:en:Nyuserre Ini|Nyuserre Ini]]. It is associated with the birth of [[:en:Horus|Horus]] and the goddess [[:en:Wosret|Wosret]], attested in [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]] at [[:en:Thebes, Egypt|Thebes, Egypt]], who was revered as a protector of the youthful Horus. == Background == === Old Kingdom === The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the commonly observed first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but involved the [[:en:Ritual|ritual]] of ''filling the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second lunar day. The {{ill|Menchet-Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェト祭|zh|孟切特节|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet-Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day, symbolizing the ''clothing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. === 12th Dynasty === In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]], the festival was also named ''Day of Collecting Sand of Anubis on his mountain in the Pyramid City of Senusret II, the Blessed''. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Pyramid of Senusret II]] at [[:en:El Lahun|El Lahun]] was traditionally assigned to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary temple of Senusret II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|センウセレト2世葬祭殿|zh|辛努塞尔特二世的太庙|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary temple of Senusret II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリン・パピルス10248|zh|柏林纸草文献10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), the announcement is noted in the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプトの太陰暦|zh|古埃及阴历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for the 14th regnal year of Senusret III on the [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] 18, second lunar day. Since the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|曲芸団の祭典暦|zh|杂技团节日历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhat III]] scheduled the Menchet festival for the second month of Achet without specifying the date, a lunar date announcement had not been available at the time of creating the festival calendar. ==Background== ===Old Kingdom=== The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the otherwise customary first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but instead included the [[:en:Ritual|Ritual]] of the ''Filling of the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second day of the lunar month. The {{ill|Menchet Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェット祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day and symbolized the ''Dressing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. ===12th Dynasty=== In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|12th Dynasty]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Sesostris III]], the designation ''Day of the Sand Lifting of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]] on his mountain in the pyramid city of Sesostris II, the Blessed'' was also used. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Sesostris II Pyramid]] of [[:en:El Lahun|Al-Lahun]] was traditionally assigned, by virtue of its location, to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|セソストリスIIの葬祭寺|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリンパピルス10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) it is recorded in the 14th regnal year of Sesostris III that the announcement in the {{ill|Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|ja|古代エジプトの月暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] on the second lunar day was made. Since in the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|アクロバット団の祭日暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhet III]] the Menchet Festival for the second month Achet was scheduled without a specified date, an announcement of the lunar date was not yet available at the time of the creation of that festival calendar. == Literature == * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Großes Handwörterbuch Ägyptisch – Deutsch. (2800 – 950 v. Chr.). Die Sprache der Pharaonen'' (= ''Hannig-Lexica.'' Volume 1 = ''{{ill|Cultural History of the Ancient World|de|Kulturgeschichte der Antiken Welt|ja|古代世界の文化史|zh|古代世界文化史|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural History of the Ancient World|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 64). Marburger Edition, 4th revised edition, von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9. p. 649. * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|ja|ロルフ・クラウス|zh|罗尔夫·克劳斯|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten. Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens'' (= ''Hildesheimer ägyptologische Beiträge. (HÄB).'' Volume 20). Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Incorrect ISBN|3-8067-8086-X|qq=}}. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|ja|ジークフリート・ショット|zh|西格弗里德·肖特|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491464}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten'' (= ''Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur. Abhandlungen der Geistes- und Sozialwissenschaftlichen Klasse. (AM-GS).'' 1950, Volume 10, {{ISSN|0002-2977|qq=}}). Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur et al., Mainz et al., 1950. ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar|qq=}} {{translated page|de|Chenep-scha|version=217297418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[de:Chenep-scha]] [[ja:砂を取る祭]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:Ancient_Egyptian_festivals]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] {{wikidata link|Q1069855}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Incorrect ISBN|3-8067-8086-X|qq=}}. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|ja|ジークフリート・ショット|zh|西格弗里德·肖特|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491464}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten'' (= ''Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur. Abhandlungen der Geistes- und Sozialwissenschaftlichen Klasse. (AM-GS).'' 1950, Volume 10, {{ISSN|0002-2977|qq=}}). Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur et al., Mainz et al., 1950. ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar|qq=}} {{translated page|de|Chenep-scha|version=217297418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[de:Chenep-scha]] [[ja:砂を取る祭]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:Ancient_Egyptian_festivals]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] {{wikidata link|Q1069855}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |EXPANDED-NAME = {{ill|Old Kingdom of Egypt|de|Altes Reich (Ägypten)|ja|古王国|zh|古埃及王国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Kingdom of Egypt|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|1=Old Kingdom of Egypt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q177819}} |NAME = W3-Aa1:N35-Q3:D40-N37:D36-N33:Z2
Heb-chenep-scha
''Ḥb-ḫnp-šˁ''
''Festival of Shifting Sand / Collecting Sand''
''Festival of Pouring Sand'' |EXPANDED-NAME2 = '''Festival date''' |NAME2 = N12:Z1*Z1:N5-N11:Z1*Z1 SA:x*t |NAME2-TRANSCRIPTION =''3ḫt'' |NAME2-EXPLANATION = ''Second lunar day of the second month of the Achet period'' |IMAGE1 = Pyramid at Lahun.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 300px |IMAGE1-DESCRIPTION = Pyramid of Senusret II at Al-Lahun }} Sand-gathering Day ('''Chenep-scha)''' is a festival from the {{ill|Old Kingdom of Egypt|de|Altes Reich (Ägypten)|ja|古王国|zh|古埃及王国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Kingdom of Egypt|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|1=Old Kingdom of Egypt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q177819}} under the reign of King ([[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]) [[:en:Nyuserre Ini|Nyuserre Ini]]. It is associated with the birth of [[:en:Horus|Horus]] and the goddess [[:en:Wosret|Wosret]], attested in [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]] at [[:en:Thebes, Egypt|Thebes, Egypt]], who was revered as a protector of the youthful Horus. == Background == === Old Kingdom === The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the commonly observed first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but involved the [[:en:Ritual|ritual]] of ''filling the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second lunar day. The {{ill|Menchet-Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェト祭|zh|孟切特节|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet-Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day, symbolizing the ''clothing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. === 12th Dynasty === In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]], the festival was also named ''Day of Collecting Sand of Anubis on his mountain in the Pyramid City of Senusret II, the Blessed''. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Pyramid of Senusret II]] at [[:en:El Lahun|El Lahun]] was traditionally assigned to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary temple of Senusret II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|センウセレト2世葬祭殿|zh|辛努塞尔特二世的太庙|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary temple of Senusret II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリン・パピルス10248|zh|柏林纸草文献10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), the announcement is noted in the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプトの太陰暦|zh|古埃及阴历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for the 14th regnal year of Senusret III on the [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] 18, second lunar day. Since the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|曲芸団の祭典暦|zh|杂技团节日历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhat III]] scheduled the Menchet festival for the second month of Achet without specifying the date, a lunar date announcement had not been available at the time of creating the festival calendar. ==Background== ===Old Kingdom=== The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the otherwise customary first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but instead included the [[:en:Ritual|Ritual]] of the ''Filling of the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second day of the lunar month. The {{ill|Menchet Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェット祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day and symbolized the ''Dressing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. ===12th Dynasty=== In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|12th Dynasty]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Sesostris III]], the designation ''Day of the Sand Lifting of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]] on his mountain in the pyramid city of Sesostris II, the Blessed'' was also used. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Sesostris II Pyramid]] of [[:en:El Lahun|Al-Lahun]] was traditionally assigned, by virtue of its location, to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|セソストリスIIの葬祭寺|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリンパピルス10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) it is recorded in the 14th regnal year of Sesostris III that the announcement in the {{ill|Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|ja|古代エジプトの月暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] on the second lunar day was made. Since in the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|アクロバット団の祭日暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhet III]] the Menchet Festival for the second month Achet was scheduled without a specified date, an announcement of the lunar date was not yet available at the time of the creation of that festival calendar. == Literature == * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Großes Handwörterbuch Ägyptisch – Deutsch. (2800 – 950 v. Chr.). Die Sprache der Pharaonen'' (= ''Hannig-Lexica.'' Volume 1 = ''{{ill|Cultural History of the Ancient World|de|Kulturgeschichte der Antiken Welt|ja|古代世界の文化史|zh|古代世界文化史|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural History of the Ancient World|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 64). Marburger Edition, 4th revised edition, von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9. p. 649. * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|ja|ロルフ・クラウス|zh|罗尔夫·克劳斯|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten. Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens'' (= ''Hildesheimer ägyptologische Beiträge. (HÄB).'' Volume 20). Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Incorrect ISBN|3-8067-8086-X|qq=}}. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|ja|ジークフリート・ショット|zh|西格弗里德·肖特|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491464}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten'' (= ''Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur. Abhandlungen der Geistes- und Sozialwissenschaftlichen Klasse. (AM-GS).'' 1950, Volume 10, {{ISSN|0002-2977|qq=}}). Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur et al., Mainz et al., 1950. ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar|qq=}} {{translated page|de|Chenep-scha|version=217297418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[de:Chenep-scha]] [[ja:砂を取る祭]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:Ancient_Egyptian_festivals]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] {{wikidata link|Q1069855}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

''Festival of Shifting Sand / Collecting Sand''
''Festival of Pouring Sand'' |EXPANDED-NAME2 = '''Festival date''' |NAME2 = N12:Z1*Z1:N5-N11:Z1*Z1 SA:x*t |NAME2-TRANSCRIPTION =''3ḫt'' |NAME2-EXPLANATION = ''Second lunar day of the second month of the Achet period'' |IMAGE1 = Pyramid at Lahun.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 300px |IMAGE1-DESCRIPTION = Pyramid of Senusret II at Al-Lahun }} Sand-gathering Day ('''Chenep-scha)''' is a festival from the {{ill|Old Kingdom of Egypt|de|Altes Reich (Ägypten)|ja|古王国|zh|古埃及王国|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Kingdom of Egypt|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|1=Old Kingdom of Egypt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q177819}} under the reign of King ([[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]) [[:en:Nyuserre Ini|Nyuserre Ini]]. It is associated with the birth of [[:en:Horus|Horus]] and the goddess [[:en:Wosret|Wosret]], attested in [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]] at [[:en:Thebes, Egypt|Thebes, Egypt]], who was revered as a protector of the youthful Horus. == Background == === Old Kingdom === The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the commonly observed first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but involved the [[:en:Ritual|ritual]] of ''filling the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second lunar day. The {{ill|Menchet-Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェト祭|zh|孟切特节|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet-Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day, symbolizing the ''clothing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. === 12th Dynasty === In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]], the festival was also named ''Day of Collecting Sand of Anubis on his mountain in the Pyramid City of Senusret II, the Blessed''. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Pyramid of Senusret II]] at [[:en:El Lahun|El Lahun]] was traditionally assigned to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary temple of Senusret II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|センウセレト2世葬祭殿|zh|辛努塞尔特二世的太庙|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary temple of Senusret II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリン・パピルス10248|zh|柏林纸草文献10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), the announcement is noted in the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプトの太陰暦|zh|古埃及阴历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for the 14th regnal year of Senusret III on the [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] 18, second lunar day. Since the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|曲芸団の祭典暦|zh|杂技团节日历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhat III]] scheduled the Menchet festival for the second month of Achet without specifying the date, a lunar date announcement had not been available at the time of creating the festival calendar. ==Background== ===Old Kingdom=== The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the otherwise customary first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but instead included the [[:en:Ritual|Ritual]] of the ''Filling of the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second day of the lunar month. The {{ill|Menchet Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェット祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day and symbolized the ''Dressing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. ===12th Dynasty=== In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|12th Dynasty]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Sesostris III]], the designation ''Day of the Sand Lifting of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]] on his mountain in the pyramid city of Sesostris II, the Blessed'' was also used. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Sesostris II Pyramid]] of [[:en:El Lahun|Al-Lahun]] was traditionally assigned, by virtue of its location, to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|セソストリスIIの葬祭寺|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリンパピルス10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) it is recorded in the 14th regnal year of Sesostris III that the announcement in the {{ill|Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|ja|古代エジプトの月暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] on the second lunar day was made. Since in the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|アクロバット団の祭日暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhet III]] the Menchet Festival for the second month Achet was scheduled without a specified date, an announcement of the lunar date was not yet available at the time of the creation of that festival calendar. == Literature == * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Großes Handwörterbuch Ägyptisch – Deutsch. (2800 – 950 v. Chr.). Die Sprache der Pharaonen'' (= ''Hannig-Lexica.'' Volume 1 = ''{{ill|Cultural History of the Ancient World|de|Kulturgeschichte der Antiken Welt|ja|古代世界の文化史|zh|古代世界文化史|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural History of the Ancient World|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 64). Marburger Edition, 4th revised edition, von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9. p. 649. * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|ja|ロルフ・クラウス|zh|罗尔夫·克劳斯|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten. Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens'' (= ''Hildesheimer ägyptologische Beiträge. (HÄB).'' Volume 20). Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Incorrect ISBN|3-8067-8086-X|qq=}}. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|ja|ジークフリート・ショット|zh|西格弗里德·肖特|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491464}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten'' (= ''Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur. Abhandlungen der Geistes- und Sozialwissenschaftlichen Klasse. (AM-GS).'' 1950, Volume 10, {{ISSN|0002-2977|qq=}}). Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur et al., Mainz et al., 1950. ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar|qq=}} {{translated page|de|Chenep-scha|version=217297418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[de:Chenep-scha]] [[ja:砂を取る祭]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:Ancient_Egyptian_festivals]] {{wikidata link|Q1069855}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

Since the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|曲芸団の祭典暦|zh|杂技团节日历|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhat III]] scheduled the Menchet festival for the second month of Achet without specifying the date, a lunar date announcement had not been available at the time of creating the festival calendar. ==Background== ===Old Kingdom=== The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the otherwise customary first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but instead included the [[:en:Ritual|Ritual]] of the ''Filling of the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second day of the lunar month. The {{ill|Menchet Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェット祭|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day and symbolized the ''Dressing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. ===12th Dynasty=== In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|12th Dynasty]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Sesostris III]], the designation ''Day of the Sand Lifting of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]] on his mountain in the pyramid city of Sesostris II, the Blessed'' was also used. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Sesostris II Pyramid]] of [[:en:El Lahun|Al-Lahun]] was traditionally assigned, by virtue of its location, to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|セソストリスIIの葬祭寺|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリンパピルス10248|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) it is recorded in the 14th regnal year of Sesostris III that the announcement in the {{ill|Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|ja|古代エジプトの月暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] on the second lunar day was made. Since in the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|アクロバット団の祭日暦|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhet III]] the Menchet Festival for the second month Achet was scheduled without a specified date, an announcement of the lunar date was not yet available at the time of the creation of that festival calendar. == Literature == * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Großes Handwörterbuch Ägyptisch – Deutsch. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Sesostris II Pyramid]] of [[:en:El Lahun|Al-Lahun]] was traditionally assigned, by virtue of its location, to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. Since in the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|アクロバット団の祭日暦|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhet III]] the Menchet Festival for the second month Achet was scheduled without a specified date, an announcement of the lunar date was not yet available at the time of the creation of that festival calendar. == Literature == * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Großes Handwörterbuch Ägyptisch – Deutsch. (2800 – 950 v. Chr.). Die Sprache der Pharaonen'' (= ''Hannig-Lexica.'' Volume 1 = ''{{ill|Cultural History of the Ancient World|de|Kulturgeschichte der Antiken Welt|ja|古代世界の文化史|zh|古代世界文化史|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural History of the Ancient World|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 64). Marburger Edition, 4th revised edition, von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9. p. 649. * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|ja|ロルフ・クラウス|zh|罗尔夫·克劳斯|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten. Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens'' (= ''Hildesheimer ägyptologische Beiträge. (HÄB).'' Volume 20). Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Incorrect ISBN|3-8067-8086-X|qq=}}. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|ja|ジークフリート・ショット|zh|西格弗里德·肖特|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491464}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten'' (= ''Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur. Abhandlungen der Geistes- und Sozialwissenschaftlichen Klasse. (AM-GS).'' 1950, Volume 10, {{ISSN|0002-2977|qq=}}). Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur et al., Mainz et al., 1950. ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar|qq=}} {{translated page|de|Chenep-scha|version=217297418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[de:Chenep-scha]] [[ja:砂を取る祭]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:Ancient_Egyptian_festivals]] {{wikidata link|Q1069855}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

[[de:Chenep-scha]] {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |EXPANDED-NAME = {{ill|Old Kingdom of Egypt|de|Altes Reich (Ägypten)|ja|古王国|zh|古埃及王国|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Kingdom of Egypt|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|1=Old Kingdom of Egypt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q177819}} |NAME = W3-Aa1:N35-Q3:D40-N37:D36-N33:Z2
Heb-chenep-scha
''Ḥb-ḫnp-šˁ''
''Festival of Shifting Sand / Collecting Sand''
''Festival of Pouring Sand'' |EXPANDED-NAME2 = '''Festival date''' |NAME2 = N12:Z1*Z1:N5-N11:Z1*Z1 SA:x*t |NAME2-TRANSCRIPTION =''3ḫt'' |NAME2-EXPLANATION = ''Second lunar day of the second month of the Achet period'' |IMAGE1 = Pyramid at Lahun.jpg |IMAGE1-WIDTH = 300px |IMAGE1-DESCRIPTION = Pyramid of Senusret II at Al-Lahun }} Sand-gathering Day ('''Chenep-scha)''' is a festival from the {{ill|Old Kingdom of Egypt|de|Altes Reich (Ägypten)|ja|古王国|zh|古埃及王国|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old Kingdom of Egypt|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to エジプト古王国|1=Old Kingdom of Egypt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q177819}} under the reign of King ([[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]) [[:en:Nyuserre Ini|Nyuserre Ini]]. It is associated with the birth of [[:en:Horus|Horus]] and the goddess [[:en:Wosret|Wosret]], attested in [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]] at [[:en:Thebes, Egypt|Thebes, Egypt]], who was revered as a protector of the youthful Horus. == Background == === Old Kingdom === The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the commonly observed first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but involved the [[:en:Ritual|ritual]] of ''filling the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second lunar day. The {{ill|Menchet-Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェト祭|zh|孟切特节|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet-Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day, symbolizing the ''clothing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. === 12th Dynasty === In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]], the festival was also named ''Day of Collecting Sand of Anubis on his mountain in the Pyramid City of Senusret II, the Blessed''. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Pyramid of Senusret II]] at [[:en:El Lahun|El Lahun]] was traditionally assigned to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary temple of Senusret II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|センウセレト2世葬祭殿|zh|辛努塞尔特二世的太庙|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary temple of Senusret II|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリン・パピルス10248|zh|柏林纸草文献10248|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}), the announcement is noted in the {{ill|Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|ja|エジプトの太陰暦|zh|古埃及阴历|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar (Ancient Egypt)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for the 14th regnal year of Senusret III on the [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] 18, second lunar day. Since the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|曲芸団の祭典暦|zh|杂技团节日历|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhat III]] scheduled the Menchet festival for the second month of Achet without specifying the date, a lunar date announcement had not been available at the time of creating the festival calendar. ==Background== ===Old Kingdom=== The Chenep-scha festival did not fall on the otherwise customary first day of the [[:en:New moon|New Moon]], but instead included the [[:en:Ritual|Ritual]] of the ''Filling of the [[:en:Eye of Horus|Eye of Horus]]'' on the second day of the lunar month. The {{ill|Menchet Festival|de|Menchet-Fest|ja|メンチェット祭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Menchet Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} followed one day later on the third day and symbolized the ''Dressing of the [[:en:Moon|Moon]]''. ===12th Dynasty=== In the [[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|12th Dynasty]], under [[:en:Senusret III|Sesostris III]], the designation ''Day of the Sand Lifting of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]] on his mountain in the pyramid city of Sesostris II, the Blessed'' was also used. The [[:en:Pyramid of Senusret II|Sesostris II Pyramid]] of [[:en:El Lahun|Al-Lahun]] was traditionally assigned, by virtue of its location, to the ''Mountain of [[:en:Anubis|Anubis]]''. From the diary of the {{ill|Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|de|Totentempel des Sesostris II.|ja|セソストリスIIの葬祭寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mortuary Temple of Sesostris II|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Papyrus Berlin 10248|de|Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja|ベルリンパピルス10248|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Papyrus Berlin 10248|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) it is recorded in the 14th regnal year of Sesostris III that the announcement in the {{ill|Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|de|Mondkalender (Altes Ägypten)|1=Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|ja|古代エジプトの月暦|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar (Ancient Egypt)|13=User:Immanuelle/Ancient Egyptian Lunar Calendar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} for [[:en:Season of the Inundation|Achet]] on the second lunar day was made. Since in the {{ill|Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|lt=Festival calendar of the acrobat troupe|de|Festkalender der Akrobatentruppe|ja|アクロバット団の祭日暦|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Festival Calendar of the Acrobat Troupe|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} from the 35th regnal year of [[:en:Amenemhat III|Amenemhet III]] the Menchet Festival for the second month Achet was scheduled without a specified date, an announcement of the lunar date was not yet available at the time of the creation of that festival calendar. == Literature == * [[:en:Rainer Hannig|Rainer Hannig]]: ''Großes Handwörterbuch Ägyptisch – Deutsch. (2800 – 950 v. Chr.). Die Sprache der Pharaonen'' (= ''Hannig-Lexica.'' Volume 1 = ''{{ill|Cultural History of the Ancient World|de|Kulturgeschichte der Antiken Welt|ja|古代世界の文化史|zh|古代世界文化史|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cultural History of the Ancient World|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.'' Volume 64). Marburger Edition, 4th revised edition, von Zabern, Mainz 2006, ISBN 3-8053-1771-9. p. 649. * {{ill|Rolf Krauss|de|Rolf Krauss|ja|ロルフ・クラウス|zh|罗尔夫·克劳斯|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rolf Krauss|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}: ''Sothis- und Monddaten. Studien zur astronomischen und technischen Chronologie Altägyptens'' (= ''Hildesheimer ägyptologische Beiträge. (HÄB).'' Volume 20). Gerstenberg, Hildesheim 1985, {{Incorrect ISBN|3-8067-8086-X|qq=}}. * {{ill|Siegfried Schott|de|Siegfried Schott|ja|ジークフリート・ショット|zh|西格弗里德·肖特|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Siegfried Schott|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491464}}: ''Altägyptische Festdaten'' (= ''Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur. Abhandlungen der Geistes- und Sozialwissenschaftlichen Klasse. (AM-GS).'' 1950, Volume 10, {{ISSN|0002-2977|qq=}}). Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur et al., Mainz et al., 1950. ==References== {{Egyptian Calendar Navbar|qq=}} {{translated page|de|Chenep-scha|version=217297418|comment=Imported full de history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian festivals]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] }} [[de:Chenep-scha]] [[ja:砂を取る祭]] [[Category:Festival Calendar of the Month Achet II]] [[Category:Ancient_Egyptian_festivals]] {{wikidata link|Q1069855}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]
